assessor_1_raw: IT support semantic retrieval: well-designed experiment. Temporal split, equal tuning, and stratified secondary metrics are appropriate. Expert audit validates label quality. Recall@10 is appropriate for the operational goal (article in initial agent view). Vocabulary overlap assessment is a useful transparency check. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Sound retrieval experiment with proper fit-apply separation, expert label audit, and stratified evaluation. The metadata ablation directly tests whether metadata or semantic understanding drives improvement. Bootstrap CIs with 95% confidence are included. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: The design correctly uses Recall@10 for multi-label data (multiple correct articles). The stratification by article popularity quintile detects confounded performance on high-frequency articles. Vocabulary overlap measurement is an honest transparency check. No methodological flaws. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: Unanimous defense_wins from all three assessors.
